title: oenothera atrovirens var. ostreae
intro: Oenothera atrovirens var. ostreae, also known as the Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species in the Onagraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera atrovirens var. ostreae include relief from menstrual cramps, eczema, and other skin conditions, as well as support for heart health and immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include oil extracts and capsules, which can be used to supplement the diet and promote overall well-being.
